details.reasoning: The implementation fully satisfies all rubric requirements. The agent created a complete PixelArt provider package under packages/pixelart/ with: (1) proper package.json with correct dependencies and exports; (2) exported createPixelArt factory function; (3) PixelArtProvider interface with image() and imageModel() methods; (4) PixelArtImageModel class implementing ImageModelV3 with doGenerate() method; (5) image settings schema supporting size, style enum ('pixel', 'retro', '8bit'), and pixelDensity (1-32 range); (6) base URL correctly set to https://api.pixelart.ai/v1; (7) proper provider structure following AI SDK patterns with tsconfig, tsup, vitest configs, error handling, and authorization; (8) only new files created with no modifications to existing packages. Comprehensive tests verify the implementation including request formatting, provider options, error handling, and edge cases.
